phrases.intent_en: Ask where the luggage storage is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la consigna de equipajes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DON-deh eh-STAH lah kohn-SEEN-yah deh eh-kee-PAH-khes?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla 3, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main lobby, on the right.

responses.english: At the main lobby, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto a la taquilla 3, a la derecha.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las máquinas de billetes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DONday eh-STAHN las MA-kee-nas deh bee-YEH-tes?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the hall, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the hall, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la derecha.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo solicito asistencia para pasajeros?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh soh-lee-SEE-toh ah-sees-TEHN-see-ah pah-rah pah-sah-HAY-rohs

likely_response.local: Acuda al mostrador de atención al cliente.
likely_response.pronunciation: ah-KOO-dah AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH ah-tehn-thee-ÓN AHL klee-EHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the customer service desk.

responses.english: Go to the customer service desk.
responses.phonetic: ah-KOO-dah AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH ah-tehn-thee-ÓN AHL klee-EHN-teh
responses.french: Acuda al mostrador de atención al cliente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information point is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo encontrar información turística?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kohn-TRAHR een-for-mah-SYOHN too-REE-stee-kah

likely_response.local: Junto a la salida principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Outside the station, on the left.

responses.english: Outside the station, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto a la salida principal, a la izquierda.
